Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Judge]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Judges are beings that can follow or not follow Suriel.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Battles between Judges can create spatial cracks wide enough to swallow suns.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Judge crashed through them.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — Silverlords are cautious about fighting a Judge directly.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Ozriel used his authority as a Judge to gain access to the Mad King.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — A white-clad Judge wields a Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon is alive because he was a Judge's pet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Eithan is addressed as Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — A Judge is something Li Markuth might look over his shoulder for.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Cirian's Judge was being prevented from interfering with the Reapers by the Court.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
